title: Bump to v4.0.0-RC4
body: Backports and release bump for v4.0.0-RC4

comments.body: Can you add https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13089/commits/a1bc8cb52cefd49e8cc54ae14d1864b8a1ec216e and https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/13117/commits/25e073492f266062f47c65bb20e590b023422746. The commit from dan contains some important changes
Well that's horribly confusing... Will do, but we should really try to avoid the multiple-changes-in-one-commit thing in the future
I still want to get a new buildah into this release.
@rhatdan I'd like to as well, but we have to have this ready for @jnovy by ~3:00 a.m. EST for packaging.
A few man page nits and lint is barking @mheon

LGTM
it would be nice to have the nits picked, but shrug
